pi_items.source: Confirmed by viewing task setup script which explicitly starts YDBGui via Docker container.
Confirmed by task instruction and YottaDB sandbox execution.
Confirmed by querying YottaDB database for user 'VEHU,ONE' (DFN=1).
Confirmed by viewing task description and executing YottaDB command to fetch Node 20.

The `verifier.py` file is fundamentally defective, severely truncated at line 93, causing a Python `SyntaxError: unterminated string literal`. It will always crash before awarding any visual-verification scores.

privileged_info_summary: The VEHU VistA database synthetically populates user 1 (VEHU,ONE) with Node 20 data '64659^ONE PROGRAMMER^MD^123456'. The setup scripts and task description incorrectly identify the 2nd piece ('ONE PROGRAMMER') as the Signature Block Title and the 3rd piece ('MD') as the Name, rather than vice versa. Crucially, the task's `verifier.py` script is fundamentally defective and syntactically invalid (truncated at line 93), so it will inevitably crash with a SyntaxError and fail to evaluate visual scores.
